name: darkhunt-py
description: Darkhunt developer tools for Claude Code (Python) — skills for integrating Darkhunt LLM observability and security into your Python services.

plugins.name: darkhunt-telemetry-py
plugins.description: Integration playbook for the darkhunt-telemetry Python SDK — wires LLM tracing, generations, and spans (with built-in secret/PII masking) into a Python service. Auto-invokes when you ask Claude to add Darkhunt telemetry / observability to a Python service.
